B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 19

pl_getcare: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often easy to get needed care/tests/treatment

SAS Format: OFA

3: USUALLY

4: ALWAYS

pl_hospovn: RECODE : Last 6 mths, spend one or more nights in a hospital

SAS Format: YNA

1: YES

2: NO

pl_lowercopay: RECODE : Last 6 mths, did health plan offer to lower amount of your co-pay because of health condition

SAS Format: YNA

1: YES

2: NO
 pl_paperwk: RECODE : Last 6 mths, health plan give forms to ﬁll out

SAS Format:
